_README: Derived from docs/concept-art-brief.md. 'concepts' are the 6 narrative scenes (image stacks), each with a single 'description'. 'styles' are the art directions (one output folder each). 'variations' is how many distinct takes to generate per scene per style. Total images = concepts x styles x variations. global_guidance is appended to every prompt for series consistency.

character.description: The recurring executive is the SAME man in every scene: a friendly, distinguished man in his early 60s with light/fair skin, a warm approachable expression, and bright blue-green eyes. He is completely bald on top (smooth, clean scalp) and wears modern rectangular dark-rimmed eyeglasses. His signature feature is a very long, full, bushy beard that flows well down past his chest -- salt-and-pepper grey blending to silvery-white, slightly wavy and wispy toward the ends, fullest at the chin. He has a solid, stocky build. Keep his face, bald head, glasses, and long grey-white beard consistent across every image.

global_guidance: Cohesive series: the same cozy, modern, sunlit work-from-home office recurs across scenes. Strong central subject, clean composition with generous negative space so it reads on a projected 16:9 slide. Warm, aspirational, business-audience-friendly mood. Avoid logos and watermarks; keep any incidental text (such as a book title) minimal and elegant.

Cinematic Photoreal.prompt: Warm editorial photography, shot on a full-frame camera with a fast prime lens: soft natural window light, gentle shallow depth of field, realistic textures and materials, a cozy aspirational lifestyle-brand look.

Polished 3D Render.prompt: A premium, friendly 3D-rendered illustration with modern animated-film production quality: soft global illumination, rounded tactile forms, matte materials, gentle ambient occlusion, approachable and clean.

Modern Flat Vector.prompt: Clean modern corporate flat-vector illustration: bold simple shapes, a confident limited palette with subtle gradients, crisp geometry, lots of negative space, a contemporary tech-brand editorial style.

concepts.name: WFH Executive - The Baseline
concepts.description: A brilliant operational consultant sits comfortably at a pristine, minimalist desk in a clean, bright, modern home office, relaxed and smiling, in business-casual attire, ready to work. The desk is almost empty -- calm and uncluttered -- representing fresh, open processing space.

concepts.name: Active Working Memory - The Organized Desk
concepts.description: The same executive, focused and content, writing notes with a pen on a document. Two or three small, neat, perfectly orderly stacks of paper are spread across the desk. The environment feels highly organized and efficient -- a healthy, light workload.

concepts.name: Context Rot - The Messy Desk
concepts.description: The same executive, now visibly stressed and rubbing their temples. The desk is absolutely buried under messy, disorganized stacks of printed paper, open reports, and post-it notes spilling over the keyboard. Overwhelmed, slow, and drowning in information.

concepts.name: Vector Memory and the RAG Assistant
concepts.description: The same home office, zoomed out slightly. Behind the desk is a beautiful floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelf packed with hundreds of books. A sharp, professional young executive assistant stands by the shelf holding a single photocopied chapter. A magnifying-glass callout over the book spines reveals a detailed table of contents, with a glowing arrow pointing to one specific chapter topic.

concepts.name: The LLM Wiki - The 50-Page Digest
concepts.description: The desk is now clean and organized, the messy stacks gone. In the center sits a sleek, premium leather-bound book -- the definitive company handbook. In the background, a focused AI Librarian character at a small side-table reviews incoming mail, emails, and market reports, typing updates into a digital draft of that same handbook, then returning the beautifully bound, updated volume to the shelf.

concepts.name: Supercharged Team Vision - Shared Memory
concepts.description: A wide grid of three or four different work-from-home offices (an operations manager, a sales rep, an HR director). On every desk sits a glowing, pulsing holographic version of the exact same employee handbook. Glowing digital data lines stream from a central cloud hub, updating all the handbooks simultaneously in real-time. Perfect alignment -- futuristic but warm.
